---
title: "❓ W-Fragen & Ja/Nein-Fragen"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    theme: none
    page-layout: full
    embed-resources: true
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700;800;900&family=Fira+Code:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="../shared/_styles.css">
---

```{=html}
<div id="top-navbar">
  <div id="nav-title">
    🇩🇪 German A1 Language
    <span class="subtitle">Beginner Study Notes · <a href="../index.html" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);text-decoration:none">← Back to Home</a></span>
  </div>
  <!-- AUTO-NAV-START -->
<div id="nav-tabs">
    <a class="nav-tab" href="alphabet.html">🔤 Alphabet</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="colors.html">🎨 Colors</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="communication.html">🗣️ Communication</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="countries.html">🌍 Countries & Languages</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="family.html">👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Family</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="game.html">🎮 Noun Flashcard Game</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="grammar.html">📐 Grammar</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="hobbies.html">🎯 Hobbies</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="komposita.html">🔗 Komposita</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="modal-verben.html">🔧 Modal Verben</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="numbers.html">🔢 Numbers</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="personal.html">👤 Personal Info</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="school.html">🏫 School</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="time.html">📅 Time & Calendar</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="verbs.html">📝 Verbs — German Verb Reference</a>
    <a class="nav-tab active" href="w-fragen.html">❓ W-Fragen & Ja/Nein-Fragen</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="wetter.html">🌤️ Das Wetter — The Weather</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="flashcards.html">🃏 Flashcard Game</a>
</div>
<!-- AUTO-NAV-END -->
  <div id="nav-dropdown"></div>
</div>
<script src="../shared/_app.js"></script>

<div id="main-content">
  <div class="hero">
    <div class="flags">❓ 🇩🇪 ✅</div>
    <h1>W-Fragen &amp; Ja/Nein-Fragen</h1>
    <p>Question words, W-questions and Yes/No questions in German</p>
  </div>
```

::: {#sec-w-fragen}

## W-Fragewörter (Question Words) {#sub-wwoerter}

::: {.callout-note}
All W-question words start with **W**. The question word goes in **Position 1**, the verb in **Position 2**.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="vocab-grid">
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Wie</div><div class="pron">[vee]</div><div class="en">How</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Wo</div><div class="pron">[voh]</div><div class="en">Where</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Wer</div><div class="pron">[vair]</div><div class="en">Who</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Wann</div><div class="pron">[van]</div><div class="en">When</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Was</div><div class="pron">[vas]</div><div class="en">What</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Woher</div><div class="pron">[voh-HAIR]</div><div class="en">Where from</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Wohin</div><div class="pron">[voh-HIN]</div><div class="en">Where to</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Warum</div><div class="pron">[va-ROOM]</div><div class="en">Why</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Welche</div><div class="pron">[VEL-kheh]</div><div class="en">Which</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Wie lange</div><div class="pron">[vee LANG-eh]</div><div class="en">How long</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Wie viel</div><div class="pron">[vee feel]</div><div class="en">How much</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Wie viele</div><div class="pron">[vee FEE-leh]</div><div class="en">How many</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Um wie viel Uhr</div><div class="pron">[oom vee feel oor]</div><div class="en">At what time</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Mit wem</div><div class="pron">[mit vaym]</div><div class="en">With whom</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Für wen</div><div class="pron">[fuer vayn]</div><div class="en">For whom</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Von wann bis wann</div><div class="pron">[fon van bis van]</div><div class="en">From when until when</div></div>
</div>
```

## W-Fragen — Sentence Structure {#sub-wstruktur}

::: {.callout-tip}
🔑 **Rule:** W-Fragewort on **Position 1** · Verb on **Position 2**
:::

```{=html}
<div class="order-box">
  <div class="order-row">
    <div class="ord-cell ord-pos1">Wo</div>
    <div class="ord-cell ord-pos2">wohnen</div>
    <div class="ord-cell ord-rest">Sie</div>
    <div class="ord-cell ord-rest">?</div>
  </div>
  <div style="font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;margin-top:.5rem;">🇩🇪 Wo wohnen Sie?</div>
  <div style="font-size:.8rem;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[voh VOH-nen zee]</div>
  <div style="font-size:.85rem;color:#374151;margin-top:.2rem;">🇬🇧 Where do you live?</div>
  <div style="font-size:.85rem;margin-top:.3rem;color:#059669;">✔ <strong>Ich wohne in Colombo.</strong> <span style="color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">(I live in Colombo.)</span></div>
</div>
<div class="order-box">
  <div class="order-row">
    <div class="ord-cell ord-pos1">Woher</div>
    <div class="ord-cell ord-pos2">kommen</div>
    <div class="ord-cell ord-rest">Sie</div>
    <div class="ord-cell ord-rest">?</div>
  </div>
  <div style="font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;margin-top:.5rem;">🇩🇪 Woher kommen Sie?</div>
  <div style="font-size:.8rem;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[voh-HAIR KOM-en zee]</div>
  <div style="font-size:.85rem;color:#374151;margin-top:.2rem;">🇬🇧 Where are you from?</div>
  <div style="font-size:.85rem;margin-top:.3rem;color:#059669;">✔ <strong>Ich komme aus Sri Lanka.</strong> <span style="color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">(I come from Sri Lanka.)</span></div>
</div>
<div class="order-box">
  <div class="order-row">
    <div class="ord-cell ord-pos1">Wie</div>
    <div class="ord-cell ord-pos2">heißt</div>
    <div class="ord-cell ord-rest">du</div>
    <div class="ord-cell ord-rest">?</div>
  </div>
  <div style="font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;margin-top:.5rem;">🇩🇪 Wie heißt du?</div>
  <div style="font-size:.8rem;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[vee hysst doo]</div>
  <div style="font-size:.85rem;color:#374151;margin-top:.2rem;">🇬🇧 What is your name?</div>
  <div style="font-size:.85rem;margin-top:.3rem;color:#059669;">✔ <strong>Ich heiße Tom.</strong> <span style="color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">(My name is Tom.)</span></div>
</div>
```

## W-Fragen — Full Examples {#sub-wexamples}

```{=html}
<table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;margin:1rem 0;font-size:.87rem;">
  <thead>
    <tr style="background:#7c3aed;color:white;">
      <th style="padding:.65rem .9rem;text-align:left;border:1px solid #6d28d9;">🇩🇪 W-Frage (German)</th>
      <th style="padding:.65rem .9rem;text-align:left;border:1px solid #6d28d9;">Pronunciation</th>
      <th style="padding:.65rem .9rem;text-align:left;border:1px solid #6d28d9;">🇬🇧 English Question</th>
      <th style="padding:.65rem .9rem;text-align:left;border:1px solid #6d28d9;">✔ Sample Answer 🇩🇪 → 🇬🇧</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;">Wo wohnen Sie?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[voh VOH-nen zee]</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">Where do you live?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;"><span style="color:#059669;font-weight:600;">Ich wohne in Colombo.</span><br><span style="color:#9ca3af;font-style:italic;font-size:.82rem;">I live in Colombo.</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr style="background:#fafafa;">
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;">Wo wohnst du?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[voh vohnst doo]</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">Where do you live? <span style="color:#9ca3af;font-size:.8rem;">(informal)</span></td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;"><span style="color:#059669;font-weight:600;">Ich wohne in Galle.</span><br><span style="color:#9ca3af;font-style:italic;font-size:.82rem;">I live in Galle.</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;">Woher kommen Sie?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[voh-HAIR KOM-en zee]</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">Where are you from?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;"><span style="color:#059669;font-weight:600;">Ich komme aus Sri Lanka.</span><br><span style="color:#9ca3af;font-style:italic;font-size:.82rem;">I come from Sri Lanka.</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr style="background:#fafafa;">
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;">Wie heißt du?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[vee hysst doo]</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">What is your name?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;"><span style="color:#059669;font-weight:600;">Ich heiße Tom.</span><br><span style="color:#9ca3af;font-style:italic;font-size:.82rem;">My name is Tom.</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;">Was trinken Sie?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[vas TRIN-ken zee]</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">What are you drinking?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;"><span style="color:#059669;font-weight:600;">Ich trinke Wasser.</span><br><span style="color:#9ca3af;font-style:italic;font-size:.82rem;">I'm drinking water.</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr style="background:#fafafa;">
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;">Was trinkt er?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[vas trinkt air]</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">What is he drinking?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;"><span style="color:#059669;font-weight:600;">Er trinkt Wasser.</span><br><span style="color:#9ca3af;font-style:italic;font-size:.82rem;">He is drinking water.</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;">Was essen Sie?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[vas ES-en zee]</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">What do you eat?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;"><span style="color:#059669;font-weight:600;">Ich esse Reis.</span><br><span style="color:#9ca3af;font-style:italic;font-size:.82rem;">I eat rice.</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr style="background:#fafafa;">
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;">Was isst er?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[vas isst air]</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">What does he eat?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;"><span style="color:#059669;font-weight:600;">Er isst Brot.</span><br><span style="color:#9ca3af;font-style:italic;font-size:.82rem;">He eats bread.</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;">Was machen Sie?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[vas MAH-khen zee]</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">What are you doing?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;"><span style="color:#059669;font-weight:600;">Ich lerne Deutsch.</span><br><span style="color:#9ca3af;font-style:italic;font-size:.82rem;">I am learning German.</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr style="background:#fafafa;">
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;">Wann kommst du?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[van komst doo]</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">When are you coming?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;"><span style="color:#059669;font-weight:600;">Ich komme um 10 Uhr.</span><br><span style="color:#9ca3af;font-style:italic;font-size:.82rem;">I'll be there at 10 o'clock.</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;">Wo arbeiten Sie?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[voh AR-by-ten zee]</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">Where do you work?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;"><span style="color:#059669;font-weight:600;">Ich arbeite in Colombo.</span><br><span style="color:#9ca3af;font-style:italic;font-size:.82rem;">I work in Colombo.</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr style="background:#fafafa;">
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;">Wo lernst du Deutsch?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[voh lairnst doo doytch]</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">Where are you learning German?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;"><span style="color:#059669;font-weight:600;">Ich lerne Deutsch in der Schule.</span><br><span style="color:#9ca3af;font-style:italic;font-size:.82rem;">I learn German at school.</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;">Warum lernst du Deutsch?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[va-ROOM lairnst doo doytch]</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">Why are you learning German?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;"><span style="color:#059669;font-weight:600;">Ich lerne Deutsch für die Arbeit.</span><br><span style="color:#9ca3af;font-style:italic;font-size:.82rem;">I am learning German for work.</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr style="background:#fafafa;">
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;">Wie viele Kinder haben Sie?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[vee FEE-leh KIN-der HAH-ben zee]</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">How many children do you have?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;"><span style="color:#059669;font-weight:600;">Ich habe zwei Kinder.</span><br><span style="color:#9ca3af;font-style:italic;font-size:.82rem;">I have two children.</span></td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## Verb → W-Frage & Ja-Nein-Frage {#sub-verbfragen}

```{=html}
<table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;margin:1rem 0;font-size:.84rem;">
  <thead>
    <tr style="background:#7c3aed;color:white;">
      <th style="padding:.6rem .7rem;border:1px solid #6d28d9;">Verb</th>
      <th style="padding:.6rem .7rem;border:1px solid #6d28d9;">❓ W-Frage 🇩🇪</th>
      <th style="padding:.6rem .7rem;border:1px solid #6d28d9;">Pronunciation</th>
      <th style="padding:.6rem .7rem;border:1px solid #6d28d9;">🇬🇧 English</th>
      <th style="padding:.6rem .7rem;border:1px solid #6d28d9;">✅ Ja-Nein-Frage 🇩🇪</th>
      <th style="padding:.6rem .7rem;border:1px solid #6d28d9;">Pronunciation</th>
      <th style="padding:.6rem .7rem;border:1px solid #6d28d9;">🇬🇧 English</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;">kommen</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:600;color:#7c3aed;">Woher kommen Sie?</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[voh-HAIR KOM-en zee]</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">Where are you from?</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:600;color:#7c3aed;">Kommen Sie aus Sri Lanka?</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[KOM-en zee ows sri LAN-ka]</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">Are you from Sri Lanka?</td>
    </tr>
    <tr style="background:#fafafa;">
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;">wohnen</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:600;color:#7c3aed;">Wo wohnt Oshini?</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[voh vohnt oh-SHEE-ni]</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">Where does Oshini live?</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:600;color:#7c3aed;">Wohnen Sie in Colombo?</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[VOH-nen zee in ko-LOM-boh]</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">Do you live in Colombo?</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;">lernen</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:600;color:#7c3aed;">Was lernen wir?</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[vas LAIR-nen veer]</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">What do we learn?</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:600;color:#7c3aed;">Lernst du Deutsch?</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[lairnst doo doytch]</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">Are you learning German?</td>
    </tr>
    <tr style="background:#fafafa;">
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;">essen</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:600;color:#7c3aed;">Was isst er?</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[vas isst air]</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">What does he eat?</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:600;color:#7c3aed;">Isst er Essen?</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[isst air ES-en]</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">Does he eat food?</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;">trinken</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:600;color:#7c3aed;">Was trinkst du?</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[vas trinkst doo]</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">What are you drinking?</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:600;color:#7c3aed;">Trinkst du Wasser?</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[trinkst doo VAS-er]</td>
      <td style="padding:.55rem .7rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">Do you drink water?</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## Ja-Nein-Frage vs. W-Frage — Side-by-Side {#sub-sidebyside}

::: {.callout-tip}
📸 **From class notes:** Compare Ja/Nein questions (verb first, yes/no answer) with W-questions (question word first, open answer).
:::

```{=html}
<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1.5rem;margin:1.5rem 0;">
  <div style="background:#fef3c7;border-radius:1rem;padding:1.25rem;border:2px solid #f59e0b;">
    <h4 style="margin:0 0 1rem;color:#92400e;font-size:1.1rem;">✅ Ja-Nein-Frage</h4>
    <div style="margin-bottom:.85rem;padding:.6rem .8rem;background:white;border-radius:.6rem;border-left:4px solid #f59e0b;">
      <div style="font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:#1f2937;">🇩🇪 Isst du Reis?</div>
      <div style="font-size:.78rem;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[isst doo rice]</div>
      <div style="font-size:.85rem;color:#374151;">🇬🇧 Do you eat rice?</div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:.85rem;padding:.6rem .8rem;background:white;border-radius:.6rem;border-left:4px solid #f59e0b;">
      <div style="font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:#1f2937;">🇩🇪 Lernst du Deutsch?</div>
      <div style="font-size:.78rem;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[lairnst doo doytch]</div>
      <div style="font-size:.85rem;color:#374151;">🇬🇧 Are you learning German?</div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:.85rem;padding:.6rem .8rem;background:white;border-radius:.6rem;border-left:4px solid #f59e0b;">
      <div style="font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:#1f2937;">🇩🇪 Spielt er Fußball?</div>
      <div style="font-size:.78rem;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[shpeelt air foos-ball]</div>
      <div style="font-size:.85rem;color:#374151;">🇬🇧 Does he play football?</div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:.85rem;padding:.6rem .8rem;background:white;border-radius:.6rem;border-left:4px solid #f59e0b;">
      <div style="font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:#1f2937;">🇩🇪 Arbeitest du heute?</div>
      <div style="font-size:.78rem;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[ar-BY-test doo HOY-teh]</div>
      <div style="font-size:.85rem;color:#374151;">🇬🇧 Are you working today?</div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:.85rem;padding:.6rem .8rem;background:white;border-radius:.6rem;border-left:4px solid #f59e0b;">
      <div style="font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:#1f2937;">🇩🇪 Stehst du um 5.00 Uhr auf?</div>
      <div style="font-size:.78rem;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[shtayst doo oom FOONF oor owf]</div>
      <div style="font-size:.85rem;color:#374151;">🇬🇧 Do you get up at 5 o'clock?</div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:.85rem;padding:.6rem .8rem;background:white;border-radius:.6rem;border-left:4px solid #f59e0b;">
      <div style="font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:#1f2937;">🇩🇪 Kannst du die Prüfung schreiben?</div>
      <div style="font-size:.78rem;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[kanst doo dee PROO-foong SHRY-ben]</div>
      <div style="font-size:.85rem;color:#374151;">🇬🇧 Can you take the exam?</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="background:#ede9fe;border-radius:1rem;padding:1.25rem;border:2px solid #8b5cf6;">
    <h4 style="margin:0 0 1rem;color:#5b21b6;font-size:1.1rem;">❓ W-Frage</h4>
    <div style="margin-bottom:.85rem;padding:.6rem .8rem;background:white;border-radius:.6rem;border-left:4px solid #8b5cf6;">
      <div style="font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:#1f2937;">🇩🇪 Mit wem isst du Reis?</div>
      <div style="font-size:.78rem;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[mit vaym isst doo rice]</div>
      <div style="font-size:.85rem;color:#374151;">🇬🇧 With whom do you eat rice?</div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:.85rem;padding:.6rem .8rem;background:white;border-radius:.6rem;border-left:4px solid #8b5cf6;">
      <div style="font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:#1f2937;">🇩🇪 Wo lernst du Deutsch?</div>
      <div style="font-size:.78rem;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[voh lairnst doo doytch]</div>
      <div style="font-size:.85rem;color:#374151;">🇬🇧 Where do you learn German?</div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:.85rem;padding:.6rem .8rem;background:white;border-radius:.6rem;border-left:4px solid #8b5cf6;">
      <div style="font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:#1f2937;">🇩🇪 Mit wem spielt er Fußball?</div>
      <div style="font-size:.78rem;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[mit vaym shpeelt air foos-ball]</div>
      <div style="font-size:.85rem;color:#374151;">🇬🇧 With whom does he play football?</div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:.85rem;padding:.6rem .8rem;background:white;border-radius:.6rem;border-left:4px solid #8b5cf6;">
      <div style="font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:#1f2937;">🇩🇪 Wie lange arbeitest du heute?</div>
      <div style="font-size:.78rem;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[vee LANG-eh ar-BY-test doo HOY-teh]</div>
      <div style="font-size:.85rem;color:#374151;">🇬🇧 How long are you working today?</div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:.85rem;padding:.6rem .8rem;background:white;border-radius:.6rem;border-left:4px solid #8b5cf6;">
      <div style="font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:#1f2937;">🇩🇪 Warum stehst du um 5.00 Uhr auf?</div>
      <div style="font-size:.78rem;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[va-ROOM shtayst doo oom FOONF oor owf]</div>
      <div style="font-size:.85rem;color:#374151;">🇬🇧 Why do you get up at 5 o'clock?</div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:.85rem;padding:.6rem .8rem;background:white;border-radius:.6rem;border-left:4px solid #8b5cf6;">
      <div style="font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:#1f2937;">🇩🇪 Wann kannst du die Prüfung schreiben?</div>
      <div style="font-size:.78rem;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[van kanst doo dee PROO-foong SHRY-ben]</div>
      <div style="font-size:.85rem;color:#374151;">🇬🇧 When can you take the exam?</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Ja/Nein-Fragen — Sentence Structure {#sub-janeinstruktur}

::: {.callout-important}
📌 **Rule:** The **verb comes first (Position 1)**. The answer is always *Ja* or *Nein*.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="order-box">
  <div class="order-row">
    <div class="ord-cell ord-pos2">Wohnen</div>
    <div class="ord-cell ord-rest">Sie</div>
    <div class="ord-cell ord-rest">in Colombo</div>
    <div class="ord-cell ord-rest">?</div>
  </div>
  <div style="font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;margin-top:.5rem;">🇩🇪 Wohnen Sie in Colombo?</div>
  <div style="font-size:.8rem;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[VOH-nen zee in ko-LOM-boh]</div>
  <div style="font-size:.85rem;color:#374151;margin-top:.2rem;">🇬🇧 Do you live in Colombo?</div>
  <div style="font-size:.85rem;margin-top:.35rem;">
    <span style="color:#059669;font-weight:700;">Ja:</span>
    <span style="color:#059669;font-weight:600;"> Ja, ich wohne in Colombo.</span>
    <span style="color:#9ca3af;font-style:italic;"> (Yes, I live in Colombo.)</span>
    &nbsp;|&nbsp;
    <span style="color:#dc2626;font-weight:700;">Nein:</span>
    <span style="color:#dc2626;font-weight:600;"> Nein, ich wohne in Kandy.</span>
    <span style="color:#9ca3af;font-style:italic;"> (No, I live in Kandy.)</span>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Ja/Nein-Fragen — Full Examples {#sub-janeinexamples}

```{=html}
<table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;margin:1rem 0;font-size:.85rem;">
  <thead>
    <tr style="background:#7c3aed;color:white;">
      <th style="padding:.65rem .8rem;border:1px solid #6d28d9;">🇩🇪 Ja-Nein-Frage (German)</th>
      <th style="padding:.65rem .8rem;border:1px solid #6d28d9;">Pronunciation</th>
      <th style="padding:.65rem .8rem;border:1px solid #6d28d9;">🇬🇧 English Question</th>
      <th style="padding:.65rem .8rem;border:1px solid #6d28d9;">✔ Ja-Answer 🇩🇪 → 🇬🇧</th>
      <th style="padding:.65rem .8rem;border:1px solid #6d28d9;">✘ Nein-Answer 🇩🇪 → 🇬🇧</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;">Wohnen Sie in Colombo?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[VOH-nen zee in ko-LOM-boh]</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">Do you live in Colombo?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;"><span style="color:#059669;font-weight:600;">Ja, ich wohne in Colombo.</span><br><span style="color:#9ca3af;font-style:italic;font-size:.8rem;">Yes, I live in Colombo.</span></td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;text-align:center;">—</td>
    </tr>
    <tr style="background:#fafafa;">
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;">Wohnst du in Galle?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[vohnst doo in GAL-eh]</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">Do you live in Galle?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;text-align:center;">—</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;"><span style="color:#dc2626;font-weight:600;">Nein, ich wohne in Kandy.</span><br><span style="color:#9ca3af;font-style:italic;font-size:.8rem;">No, I live in Kandy.</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;">Kommst du aus Italien?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[komst doo ows ee-TAL-yen]</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">Are you from Italy?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;text-align:center;">—</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;"><span style="color:#dc2626;font-weight:600;">Nein, ich komme aus Polen.</span><br><span style="color:#9ca3af;font-style:italic;font-size:.8rem;">No, I'm from Poland.</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr style="background:#fafafa;">
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;">Heißt du Tom?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[hysst doo Tom]</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">Is your name Tom?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;"><span style="color:#059669;font-weight:600;">Ja, ich heiße Tom.</span><br><span style="color:#9ca3af;font-style:italic;font-size:.8rem;">Yes, my name is Tom.</span></td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;text-align:center;">—</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;">Trinken Sie Wasser?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[TRIN-ken zee VAS-er]</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">Do you drink water?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;"><span style="color:#059669;font-weight:600;">Ja, ich trinke Wasser.</span><br><span style="color:#9ca3af;font-style:italic;font-size:.8rem;">Yes, I drink water.</span></td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;text-align:center;">—</td>
    </tr>
    <tr style="background:#fafafa;">
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;">Trinken Sie Cola?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[TRIN-ken zee KOH-la]</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">Do you drink cola?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;text-align:center;">—</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;"><span style="color:#dc2626;font-weight:600;">Nein, ich trinke keine Cola.</span><br><span style="color:#9ca3af;font-style:italic;font-size:.8rem;">No, I don't drink cola.</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;">Kommst du heute?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[komst doo HOY-teh]</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">Are you coming today?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;"><span style="color:#059669;font-weight:600;">Ja, ich komme (heute).</span><br><span style="color:#9ca3af;font-style:italic;font-size:.8rem;">Yes, I'm coming (today).</span></td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;text-align:center;">—</td>
    </tr>
    <tr style="background:#fafafa;">
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;">Kommt Anil heute?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[komt AH-nil HOY-teh]</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">Is Anil coming today?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;text-align:center;">—</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;"><span style="color:#dc2626;font-weight:600;">Nein, Anil/er kommt nicht.</span><br><span style="color:#9ca3af;font-style:italic;font-size:.8rem;">No, Anil/he is not coming.</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;color:#7c3aed;">Kommt ihr morgen?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;">[komt eer MOR-gen]</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#374151;">Are you (all) coming tomorrow?</td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;"><span style="color:#059669;font-weight:600;">Ja, auf jeden Fall.</span><br><span style="color:#9ca3af;font-style:italic;font-size:.8rem;">Yes, definitely.</span></td>
      <td style="padding:.6rem .8rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;text-align:center;">—</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## Quick Sort: W-Frage oder Ja-Nein-Frage? {#sub-sort}

```{=html}
<div class="conj-box">
  <div class="conj-card">
    <h5>❓ W-Frage</h5>
    <p style="font-size:.9rem;color:#374151;">🇩🇪 <strong>Wie heißt das auf Deutsch?</strong><br><span style="color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;font-size:.85rem;">🇬🇧 What is that called in German?</span></p>
    <p style="font-size:.9rem;color:#374151;margin-top:.6rem;">🇩🇪 <strong>Wo wohnst du?</strong><br><span style="color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;font-size:.85rem;">🇬🇧 Where do you live?</span></p>
    <p style="font-size:.9rem;color:#374151;margin-top:.6rem;">🇩🇪 <strong>Wann kommst du mit?</strong><br><span style="color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;font-size:.85rem;">🇬🇧 When are you joining?</span></p>
  </div>
  <div class="conj-card">
    <h5>✅ Ja-Nein-Frage (Satzfrage)</h5>
    <p style="font-size:.9rem;color:#374151;">🇩🇪 <strong>Können Sie bitte das an die Tafel schreiben?</strong><br><span style="color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;font-size:.85rem;">🇬🇧 Can you please write that on the board?</span></p>
    <p style="font-size:.9rem;color:#374151;margin-top:.6rem;">🇩🇪 <strong>Kauft er bei Arpico ein?</strong><br><span style="color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;font-size:.85rem;">🇬🇧 Does he shop at Arpico?</span></p>
    <p style="font-size:.9rem;color:#374151;margin-top:.6rem;">🇩🇪 <strong>Kommst du heute mit?</strong><br><span style="color:#6b7280;font-style:italic;font-size:.85rem;">🇬🇧 Are you coming along today?</span></p>
  </div>
</div>
```

:::

```{=html}
<div style="text-align:center;margin-top:3rem;padding:1.5rem;color:#9333ea;font-size:.9rem;">
  <a href="../index.html" style="color:#7c3aed;font-weight:700;text-decoration:none">← Back to All Topics</a>
  &nbsp;·&nbsp; <em>Viel Erfolg!</em> (Good luck!)
</div>
</div><!-- /main-content -->
```
